holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: EUV is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 9.27%, ASML Holding at 8.70%, Lam Research at 5.87%, Applied Materials at 5.77%, and KLA Corporation at 5.05%.

overview.description: The Corgi Lithography & Semiconductor Photonics ETF (EUV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund invests across the photonics value chain. The actively managed ETF targets companies from around the world involved in the development, deployment, and operation of photonics and light-based technologies. EUV was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
